summary: Tested map filter functionality for drivers in Trend Syria e-commerce app. The filter buttons (متاحة/طلباتي/الكل) are implemented and working correctly. Filters allow drivers to toggle between viewing 'Available Orders', 'My Orders', and 'All' on the map.

minor.issue: Returns 401 for some requests - authentication token may expire quickly

integration_issues.issue: UI sometimes shows driver as 'not available' even when API confirms they are available. May be a state sync issue.

critical_code_review_comments: OrdersMap.js - Filter logic at lines 1655-1682 is correctly implemented with three filter states: 'available', 'myOrders', 'all'
Filter UI buttons at lines 1837-1885 are properly styled with distinct colors (green for available, blue for my orders, purple for all)
Driver marker is always shown regardless of filter (line 1665: if (m.type === 'driver') return true)
Filter counts are dynamically calculated from orders arrays
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test data (3 driver orders, 4 available orders)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map filter feature tested successfully. Access path: Login as driver -> Click 'طلباتي' tab -> Click 'خريطة طلباتي' button. Filter buttons are in the second row of the map header: متاحة (x) | طلباتي (x) | الكل. Priority order popup may appear when opening map - dismiss with 'رفض' button.

map_filters.location: OrdersMap component - second row of map header

filter_buttons.name: متاحة
filter_buttons.function: Shows only available orders (not accepted by driver)

map_filters.driver_marker: Always visible regardless of filter selection

marker_counts_observed.my_orders_filter: 5 markers (3 orders with store + customer markers)
marker_counts_observed.available_filter: 0 markers (available orders not passed to map in this context)
marker_counts_observed.all_filter: 0 markers (same as available - depends on data passed to component)

filtering_logic.implementation: Correct - filters markers based on isMyOrder property

filter_ui.implementation: Correct - three buttons with proper styling and click handlers

default_filter.note: Default filter is set to 'myOrders' which makes sense for driver workflow
